text:
is a manga series created by Hajime Isayama. Other articles with this name include:
Attack on Titan (Anime) - The anime adaptation of said work, directed by and .
Attack Titan - The name of the Titan inherited by Eren Yeager.
The Attack Titan - The 88th chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Attack Titan (Episode) - The 58th episode of the Attack on Titan anime. 
Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya - The first compilation movie of the anime.
Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa - The second compilation movie.
Attack on Titan: Roar of Awakening - The third compilation movie.
Attack on Titan: Chronicle - The fourth compilation movie.
Attack on Titan: THE LAST ATTACK - The fifth compilation movie.
Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 1 - The first live-action movie based on the series.
Shōsetsu Eiga Attack on Titan - The novelization of said movie.
Attack on Titan, The Movie: Part 2 - The second live-action movie based on the series.
Shōsetsu Eiga Attack on Titan: End of the World - The novelization of said movie.
Attack on Titan: Hangeki No Noroshi - A web miniseries based on the manga and the live-action films.
"Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack - The first soundtrack album of the anime.
ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn - One of the songs from said album.
Attack on Titan (Game) - A game that is on the PS4, PS3, PS-Vita, Xbox One and PC (Steam), based on the first season of the Attack on Titan anime.
Attack on Titan: Junior High (Manga) - A parody manga written and illustrated by Saki Nakagawa.
Attack on Titan: High School - A parody manga and sequel to Attack on Titan: Junior High, written and illustrated by Saki Nakagawa.
Attack on Titan: Junior High (Anime) - Anime version of the aforementioned manga.
Attack on Titan 2 (Game) - Sequel of the first Attack on Titan game, available on PS4, Nintendo Switch, Xbox One, Playstation Vita (Japan only), and PC. Based on seasons 1 and 2 of the Attack on Titan anime (the expansion is based on Season 3).
Attack on Attack on Titan - The second short story of the Attack on Titan Anthology. It is written, illustrated, and lettered by Evan Dorkin and Sarah Dyer, and colored by Bill Mudron.
Attack on Titan: Short Stories - The 1st booklet of short stories written by series' creator Hajime Isayama. 
Attack on Titan: Special Omnibus - A special recap series that retells the entire story of the anime prior to Special 1.
Attack on Titan 3 (Game) - Sequel of the second Attack on Titan game, PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Xbox Series X|S, and PC. Based on the entirety of the Attack on Titan anime.
